vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural integrity and aerodynamic performance for the wing.
Support control surfaces with hinges.
Ensure airflow over the wing rib.
Dissipate heat from sun exposure.
Transfer lift forces to the fuselage.
Integrate with adjacent subsystems.

risk.desc: Potential interference between motor mount and cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Optimize motor mount position during integration.

risk.desc: Limited access to equipment bay may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access window.

risk.desc: Threaded connections may require additional support for engagement.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses for threaded connections.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around bay door hinge may cause jamming.
risk.mit: Adjust hinge clearance to ensure smooth operation.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to tolerance mismatch between subsystems.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.path: Cooling air from motor pod inlet to pod interior
Motor pod pitch adjustment via revolute bearing at wing spar
Access to equipment bay through hinged door

integration_opportunities.opportunity: integrate motor mount with cooling inlet for streamlined airflow
optimize hinge location for minimal interference with internal components
add modular trays for easy installation and removal of equipment

manufacturing_strategy.support: vertical orientation for optimal print direction
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection for surface finish and dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.feature: overall mass of the center body pod
airflow rate and distribution within the pod
ease of equipment installation and removal

risk.desc: Risk of improper fastener torque leading to joint failure.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in snap-fit interfaces may cause binding.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances based on prototype testing.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening during final assembly damaging components.
risk.mit: Train assembly personnel on proper handling techniques.
